twitter.copy: Black Friday Sale! Get 25% off our effective & affordable skincare solutions. Quality & service you can trust! #Beminimalist #BlackFridaySale #SkincareDeals

instagram.copy: It's time to glow! This Black Friday, enjoy 25% off our entire range of skincare products. At Beminimalist, we pride ourselves on quality and service. Treat yourself to a skincare routine that truly works! #Beminimalist #BlackFridaySale #SkincareLovers #NaturalSkincare
